postToolUse.bash: command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; tmp_list=$(mktemp /tmp/golangci-lint-files-XXXXXX) || exit 0; tmp_dirs=$(mktemp /tmp/golangci-lint-dirs-XXXXXX) || exit 0; trap 'rm -f "$tmp_list" "$tmp_dirs"' EXIT HUP INT TERM; { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.go"; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.go"; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "*.go"; } | awk "NF" | sort -u > "$tmp_list"; if [ ! -s "$tmp_list" ]; then exit 0; fi; while IFS= read -r f; do dirname "$f"; done < "$tmp_list" | sort -u > "$tmp_dirs"; fails=0; while IFS= read -r dir; do [ -d "$dir" ] || continue; if ! golangci-lint run --fix --issues-exit-code 2 "./$(echo "$dir" | sed 's|^\./||')/..."; then fails=$((fails + 1)); fi; done < "$tmp_dirs"; if [ "$fails" -gt 0 ]; then exit 2; fi
